_publications._publicationTitle: Recommendations for assessing appearance concerns related to plexiform and cutaneous neurofibromas in neurofibromatosis 1 clinical trials.

_contextSnippet: The reliability of the health-related quality of life scales, including Appearance Distress, was high with Pearson Separation Index values ≥0.83 with and without extremes, and Cronbach alpha values ≥0.87 with and without extremes.
details: High reliability with Pearson Separation Index values ≥0.83 with and without extremes, and Cronbach alpha values ≥0.87 with and without extremes
